## Checklist

- [ ] Matches the relevant standards in `docs/standards/`
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes (`docs/standards/testing.md`)
- [ ] Documentation updated for anything this change affects
- [ ] New dependencies justified per `docs/standards/dependency-management.md`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `memory/` updated (lessons learned, roadmap, or patterns) if applicable
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included in this change

See `CLAUDE.md` §12 for the full Review Checklist.
